Class AppUser

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.auth.AppUser
public class AppUser extends Object
Represents an authenticated user account in the flight booking system. Stores user credentials, personal information, and role-based permissions. Links user accounts to customer records for integrated booking management. Supports different user roles (ADMIN, USER) for access control.
